build_system: Gradle with Kotlin DSL, compileSdk 34, minSdk 26, JVM target 17
test_framework: JUnit 4 + Espresso + Compose UI testing (no unit tests currently present)
verification_instructions: Run assembleDebug to confirm the project compiles without errors. There are no existing unit tests to run.
setup_instructions: Java 17 already available at /root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2. Gradle wrapper present in MysticNusa/.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No Android device/emulator for instrumented tests - use compile verification only.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Phase-based UI navigation using enum (e.g., TarotPhase). ViewModel with StateFlow<UiState>. GamesRepository wraps Retrofit calls with Result<T>. ApiService defines Retrofit endpoints. Data models use Gson @SerializedName. Reusable components: MysticButton, MysticCard, MysticTextField. Theme colors: MysticGold, MysticPurple, MysticSurface, TextSecondary. BASE_URL is https://mystical-nusa.web.id/api/. Image URLs from server are relative - prepend https://mystical-nusa.web.id/.
directory_structure: MysticNusa/app/src/main/java/com/mysticnusa/app/ contains: data/ (models/, remote/, repository/, local/), ui/ (screens/, viewmodels/, components/, theme/), navigation/ (Screen.kt, NavGraph.kt), MainActivity.kt, MysticNusaApp.kt
